scripts.lint: eslint app components hooks lib prisma scripts server store tests types next.config.ts tailwind.config.ts tailwind.config.js postcss.config.js --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.test: npm run test:service-fees && npm run test:fraud && npm run test:products && npm run test:payments && npm run test:rbac && npm run test:qa && npm run test:ops
scripts.test:service-fees: set "NODE_ENV=test" && set "TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json" && node --require ts-node/register/transpile-only --require tsconfig-paths/register --test tests/finance/service-fees.test.js
scripts.test:fraud: set "NODE_ENV=test" && set "TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json" && node --require ts-node/register/transpile-only --require tsconfig-paths/register --test tests/fraud/shared.test.js
scripts.test:payments: set "NODE_ENV=test" && set "TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json" && node --require ts-node/register/transpile-only --require tsconfig-paths/register --test tests/payment/urls.test.js tests/payment/readiness.test.js tests/payment/safety.test.js
scripts.test:rbac: set "NODE_ENV=test" && set "TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json" && node --require ts-node/register/transpile-only --require tsconfig-paths/register --test tests/security/rbac-route-protection.test.js tests/security/b2b-lifecycle.test.js tests/security/upload-security.test.js
scripts.test:qa: set "NODE_ENV=test" && set "TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json" && node --require ts-node/register/transpile-only --require tsconfig-paths/register --test tests/qa/qa-hardening.test.js
scripts.test:ops: set "NODE_ENV=test" && set "TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json" && node --require ts-node/register/transpile-only --require tsconfig-paths/register --test tests/ops/monitoring-readiness.test.js
